blended.narrative: Anthony Lakes is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,581 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 2.5" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
